title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Nucleus Software - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Nucleus Software family as a Backend Developer in Lucknow. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Nucleus Software:
Nucleus Software is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Implement new features based on product requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nucleus Software!
